title: Cellulose model selection validation (temporal CV) + fire-correction diagnostic
description:
Reproducible code and figures for temporal cross-validation of cellulosic ageing models (linear vs saturating in 1/DP) on the European paper database, plus a diagnostic Arrhenius fire-correction case study on published flax mechanical-dating data. Ea = 110 kJ/mol (Emsley & Stevens, 1994).

Scope: methodological evaluation only; no artifact-authenticity claims.
notes: For citation metadata, see CITATION.cff (preferred). Key parameters: Ea = 110 kJ/mol, sigma_R = 155 MPa, Basso calibration m = 9.256e-4.
